case_title: CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE VS. ASEM NOUFAL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,135.00 FILED BY CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE AS TO DEFENDANT NOUFAL, ASEM ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-15-2022 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER TO CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT: PENDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $132.50) SERVED NOV-28-2022, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT NOUFAL, ASEM
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SARAH HEYWORTH, CLAIMS ADJUSTER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-15-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JAN-26-2023 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY SARAH HEYWORTH, CLAIMS ADJUSTER. DEFENDANT ASEM NOUFAL IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT FOR A PAYMENT TO THE PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE JAN-26-2023 HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ERIC GROVER; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
DECLARATION FOR DEFENDANT'S CURRENT ADDRESS FILED BY DEFENDANT NOUFAL, ASEM

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: MURLENE J. RANDLE; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
STIPULATION TO ALLOW THE CASE TO BE HEARD BY A JUDGE PRO TEM. NOUFAL, ASEM
